message:
fix: validateIssueIDPrefix now checks allowed_prefixes config (GH#1179)

The prefix validation was only checking the primary issue_prefix, rejecting
issues from merged databases with different prefixes. Now also checks the
allowed_prefixes config value (comma-separated list of additional valid prefixes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
